generated_stress.claim: deterministic stress evidence, not 500 independent npm behaviors

independent_behavioral.contract_scope: three reviewed install behaviors; generated repetitions are reported separately

native_security.linux_pr_evidence: strict controls passed on Ubuntu 24.04; Ubuntu 22.04 proved fail-closed degradation

limitations: Independent behavioral evidence currently covers three reviewed install behaviors, not every npm workflow.
Oath is slower than npm and Bun in the current installer benchmark.
